Operations Lead — prospective LLO evaluating ACE for a Nairobi-market deployment

Can the weekly review surface a struggling FLW early enough to help, and can a program admin tell whether I'm doing my job well?

Naima Otieno

Connect Labs home — the synthetic environment

Logged in as ace@dimagi-ai.com · https://labs.connect.dimagi.com/

Labs is where ACE renders synthetic dashboards before any real FLW activity. The marketing-style home is also the landing surface a Dimagi staffer would share with a prospective LLO before deep-linking into the workflow.

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5 (weakest: Content). A: Content 3/5 — public marketing page, not opp-specific. B: App Page 4/5 — clean styled. C: Screenshot 4/5 — good full-page. D: Slide 4/5 — clear. E: Demo Ready 3/5 — needs an opp-anchored screen, not the public home.

Naima Otieno

LLO Weekly Review — workflow definition page

Logged in as ace@dimagi-ai.com · https://labs.connect.dimagi.com/labs/workflow/3061/?opportunity_id=1788

The LLO Weekly Review is wired with 4 KPIs (photo_quality_pass_rate, form_completion_rate, vendor_education_delivery, vendor_consent_rate) and a coaching task template. Status badges include Pending / On Track / Underperforming / Coaching Task Created.

✨ AI Quality ★★☆☆☆ (2/5)

Overall: 2/5 (weakest: Demo Ready). A: Content 3/5 — JSON visible. B: App Page 3/5 — definition view, not rendered render_code. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 3/5. E: Demo Ready 2/5 — a stakeholder needs the rendered React dashboard, not the JSON definition; labs UI requires interactive context-selection that didn't complete in headless flow.

Naima Otieno

Week 1 saved-run instance (Apr 16–23)

Logged in as ace@dimagi-ai.com · https://labs.connect.dimagi.com/labs/workflow/run/3066/?opportunity_id=1788

Each weekly review is saved as an instance. Status: completed. Period: 2026-04-16 → 2026-04-23. Opportunity ID: 1788. Clicking 'Open Workflow' would render the polished React UI with named FLW story cards and anomaly badges.

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5 (weakest: Content). A: Content 3/5 — clean instance metadata. B: App Page 4/5 — purpose-built. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 3/5 — viewer wants to see what's INSIDE the instance. E: Demo Ready 3/5 — instance metadata is real but the audience wants the dashboard inside.

Naima Otieno

Program Admin Audit — workflow definition

Logged in as ace@dimagi-ai.com · https://labs.connect.dimagi.com/labs/workflow/3064/?opportunity_id=1788

The meta-workflow watching the LLO weekly review. watched_workflow_id: 3061. Status badges: Pending / Compliant / Process Gap / Needs Intervention. The funder-facing answer to 'how do we know the LLO is doing their job?'

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)

Overall: 3/5 (weakest: Demo Ready). A: Content 3/5 — JSON shows the audit semantics (statuses for compliance). B: App Page 3/5 — definition view. C: Screenshot 4/5. D: Slide 3/5. E: Demo Ready 3/5 — meta-workflow concept is clear from JSON; rendered version would be more visceral.

Second saved instance feeds the Program Admin Audit. Period 2026-04-23 → 2026-04-30 covers the week Dinesh was coached. Two snapshots are the minimum the audit workflow needs to render week-over-week deltas.

✨ AI Quality ★★★☆☆ (3/5)
